lessons.title: Classes vs Structs 🏛️
lessons.description: Understand the massive difference between Value and Reference types.

lessons.title: Initialization Rules 🏗️
lessons.description: Classes don't build themselves. Learn how to write an init() function.

lessons.title: Inheritance (Family Traits) 🧬
lessons.description: Create a Superclass and let subclasses inherit all its properties for free!

lessons.title: Overriding Methods ⚔️
lessons.description: How a subclass can rebel and change the behavior it inherited.
